2271660.name: RPG Maker MZ - Winlu Fantasy Tileset -  Interior
2271660.description:
The fantasy interior set of the Winlu Tileset series offers an enormous selection of tiles and many possibilities for creating interiors. Living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, hallways, cellars, dungeons, throne rooms up to massive cathedrals can be created with the tileset.

In addition, there is an enormous number of decoration options via character sprites to make each of your rooms unique and individual. There is also an entire tilesheet page for creating taverns and stores.

The styles of textures are numerous. From farmhouses, white gold gleaming palaces and dark iron rooms, it's all there. Fires, torches, fireplaces and candles in different colors and designs will make your world look alive.

Features:

* 32 character sheets
* 10 tile sheets


* UPDATE Dec 2025:

- Added a big stair in 2 colour variations and with optional carpets.
- Also improved the chandelier and added a blurred version to create depth.
- Also improved some tiles around the set and chests.

* UPDATE May 2025:

- Improved barrels
- Improved the candles and light
- Added brown and red candles
- Added !$symbol also as glowing version
- Added a piano
- Added a new throne
- Added new cathedral tiles
- Improved the curtain and chimney character sprites
- Added a new fireplace chimney



Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
2271660.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语
